# Iron & Steel / Roofing Merchant Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-iron-steel-iron-steel-merchant
**Vertical slug:** iron-steel
**VN-ID:** VN-COM-CON-002
**Niche family:** NF-COM-CON (variant of building-materials)
**Family role:** variant
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's iron and steel market is driven by a housing deficit estimated at 20+ million units and sustained construction activity. Key products: reinforcement bars (rebar/iron rod — Y10, Y12, Y16, Y20), roofing sheets (aluminum, stone-coated, long-span), angle iron, H-beams, and BRC mesh. Building Materials Market (Lagos Island), Alaba Rago, and Kano Iron Market are major hubs. Ajaokuta Steel (government), Delta Steel (DSML), and imported Chinese/Turkish products all compete. SON certification for local steel and product quality assurance are critical trust signals. WhatsApp pricing enquiry is the primary first contact for contractors.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Building contractor Emeka, 42, Lagos**: Sources Y16 and Y20 rebar for 6-storey residential block. Needs bulk pricing, delivery to site, and payment via bank transfer. WhatsApps for quote.
- **Property developer Alhaji Bello, 55, Kano**: Sourcing long-span roofing sheets for 20-unit terrace. Needs SON-certified product with cut-to-size delivery.
- **Self-builder Mrs Okafor, 48, Enugu**: Building personal residence. Needs Y10 and Y12 for slab work. Visits market but found supplier via WhatsApp first.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (merchant name, "Certified Iron & Steel Merchant"), WhatsApp quote CTA, featured products grid (rebar sizes, roofing types with ₦/tonne or ₦/sheet pricing), trust strip (SON, CAC, COREN-tested)
- **About**: Business history, sourcing network, SON compliance, delivery capability, site-supply experience
- **Products**: Rebar catalogue (Y10–Y25), roofing sheets, structural steel sections — all with tonnage/size pricing in ₦
- **Contact**: WhatsApp quote (primary), location, volume order form (NDPR-compliant)

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Professional, engineering-literate, and quality-assured. "SON-Certified Rebar", "Site Delivery Available", "Structural Steel Specialists". Primary CTA: "Get a Quote via WhatsApp". Secondary: "View Product Catalogue". Avoid: generic construction stock imagery.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- SON (Standards Organisation of Nigeria) product conformity
- CAC business registration
- COREN-tested product quality statement
- Site delivery capability notice
- Volume discount and contractor pricing badge
- Ajaokuta/DSML sourcing provenance
- Bank transfer and POS payment options

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Rebar stack — Y16/Y20 bundles in yard, price tags, Nigerian merchant in background
2. Roofing sheet display — long-span aluminum sheets, colour options, market stall
3. Site delivery — truck unloading rebar at construction site, Lagos or Abuja building context
4. SON certificate — framed on wall, product conformity evidence
5. Structural steel section — H-beam, angle iron, merchant measuring for client
6. Steel market hub — Building Materials Market Lagos Island, busy traders
7. Quality inspection — worker checking rebar grade marking, quality assurance scene

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] SON conformity certificate for iron and steel products
- [ ] CAC business registration number
- [ ] COREN quality compliance statement (if fabrication offered)
- [ ] Import documentation for foreign steel
- [ ] NDPR consent on quote form

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp quote CTA prominent
- [x] SON/CAC trust signals
- [x] Rebar grade references (Y10, Y12, Y16, Y20, Y25)
- [x] ₦ pricing per tonne/length/sheet
- [x] Nigerian market references (Building Materials Market, Alaba Rago, Kano Iron Market)
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on quote form
